raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet nu irr winnu Gihmis
aptumschohts no Melluma/ ka
tohs us Eelahm ne pasihst/ win-
nu Ahda peelihp pee winnu Kan-
leem/ ta irr iskaltutt ka Malkas
Gabbals.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tee no Sobhina nokauti
irr jo latinigt neka tee no Badda
nokauti/ jo tee aiseet itt ka no-
durti/ tapehz ka Semines Aug-
tu newatd.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "To Girdsschehligo See-
wu Rohkas irr jawus Behrnus
wahrjuschas/ tee irr winnahm
par Barribu tappuschi eeksch
tahs Satreekschanas tahs Mei-
tas mannu Lauschu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tas KUNGS irr jawu
Bahrsibu pabeidsis/ Wirsch irr
to Karstnun jawas Dusmibas
isgahsis/ un irr eeksch Zianas
weenu Ugguni eededsinajs/ kas
tohs Pamattus irr aprihjis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tee Rehnini wirs Seim-
mes ne buhtu tizzeischti/ nedg wif-
fi Pasaules Gedshwotajt/ ka tam
Prettineekam/ un tam Eenaid-
neekam bij zaur Jerusalemes
Wahrtim ee-eet.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet tas irr notizzis to
Grehku deht winnas Prawee-
tchu/ to Noseegumu deht win-
nas Preestern/ kas winnas
Widdit to Affini to Taifno irr
islehjuscht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tee skraidija schury un
tury ka Akli us Eelahm/ ar Affi-
ni sagahniti/ ta ka ne tur warre-
ja ( twertees ) no Aiskahrtcha-
nas winno Drehhju.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Lee tauze us teem:
kahpjeetees juhs Netchkihs
atkahpjeetees/ atkahpjeetees/
aiskarreet neko/ kad tee nu �
aisskrehe/ tatschu teem atpa-
bij jamardahs/ ta ka starp �
ganeem tazzihts tappe: Te-
dsihwohs tur igaki.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta KUNGA Dusmi
irr tohs iskaistifti/ Winsch �
wairs ne uhsluhkohs/ tee ne
tohs Presterus zeenijtschi/ �
teem Wezzajeem Schehlas-
parthdijschi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kamehr mehs wehl ( �
rejamees/) pamirre muh-
Azzis/ kas pehz muhfas nele-
gas Palihdsibas raudsija /
mehs ar Saidischann us ka
Tantu gaidijam/ kas isgl-
ne warreja.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tee irr muhfas Pe-
dsinnufschi/ ka mehs us muhf-
Eelahm ne warrejam staiga-
muhfu Gals irr tuwu nah-
muhfas Deenas irr pa Gall
ir muhfu Gals irr atnahzts
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Muhfu Pakkatdsin
irr tschaakakt bijuschi neka Eb-
appaksch Debbes/ tee irr �
us Kalneem wajaischi/ Tuk-
irr tee mums Walgus likku
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tas Swatdihts ta Kl
GA/* pee ka muhfu Dsihu-
kareja / irr guhstihts wi-
Bedre/ no ka mehs fazzi-
Mehs dsihwotim appaksch �
na Ehnas starp teem Pagane-
* Eebr: Wall: Muhfu Nahschu Dw-
tas irr muhfu Kehniisch.
"
    }
  ],
